CustomField.description: to display the link asset button in cpq
CustomField.formula: RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_BluEdge" && SBQQ__LineItemCount__c > 0 && OR( NATT_Line_Count_for_Display_Terms__c = 0, NATT_Line_Count_for_Display_Terms__c > 0 && NATT_Display_Terms_Without_Months__c = 0 ) && ISBLANK($User.ContactId)
CustomField.label: Display BluEdge Inventory Action
